description: Deed of sale or lease. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138 CE). The seller (or lessor) receives 6 dinars from a woman. The house "is in Fusṭāṭ in the alley of [..] in Qaṣr al-Rūm, and this 3/4 [of the house?]...." (the document seems to have been abandoned here). (Information from Moshe Yagur.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
